title: Spawn + Fresh Animations
description: This is a "Fresh Animations" patch to allow a couple of "spawn" mobs to work with them
body:
## **This pack allows "Spawn" mobs to use "FreshLX" "FA" animations**

This pack is meant to be used with "FreshLX's" "Fresh Animations" and "Ninnih_" "Spawn"

Make sure to use Entity Texture Features 7.1 and Entity Model Features 3.1.1 mods,

**_WARNING: i don't know if optifine supports the resource pack so i dont guarantee it working without bugs_**




```
Right now "Spawn + Fresh animations" supports :
- Barbed : supported
- Bluefish : not supported
- Pilotfish : not supported
- Blenny : not supported
- Herring : not supported
- Angler Fish : not supported
```



I probably wont do any other Spawn mob that is not on this list
and no Fa + Extensions supported for the time being


Modpack makers, feel free to include this pack on your modpack :D


if you see bugs don't hesitate to comment about it.

Thanks to: 
- FreshLX - Owner of Fresh Animation 
- Ninni - Owner of Spawn 
- Uncle mike - did the thanks :D
